scripts.predev: chmod +x node_modules/node-pty/prebuilds/darwin-*/spawn-helper ../node_modules/node-pty/prebuilds/darwin-*/spawn-helper 2>/dev/null; command -v portless >/dev/null 2>&1 || (echo '\nportless is required but not installed. Run: npm i -g portless\n' && exit 1)
scripts.test:terminal:contracts: pnpm exec vitest run src/server/buffer-sync-contract.test.ts src/server/daemon-service-script.test.ts src/server/daemon-mirror-lab-script.test.ts src/server/client-session-lifecycle.test.ts src/server/server.transport-lifecycle-truth.test.ts src/server/session-transport-ticket.test.ts src/contexts/SessionContext.ws-refresh.test.tsx src/components/TerminalView.dynamic-refresh.test.tsx src/components/terminal/TerminalHeader.test.tsx src/components/terminal/FileTransferSheet.test.tsx src/pages/TerminalPage.android-ime.test.tsx src/pages/TerminalPage.render-scope.test.tsx src/lib/session-transport-runtime.test.ts src/lib/terminal-buffer-replay.evidence.test.ts src/App.dynamic-refresh.test.tsx src/App.first-paint.test.tsx src/App.first-paint.real-terminal.test.tsx
scripts.test:terminal:regression: pnpm run test:terminal:contracts && pnpm run test:common-user-flows && pnpm run daemon:mirror:close-loop && pnpm run test:relay:smoke
scripts.test:common-user-flows: pnpm exec vitest run src/lib/tmux-sessions.test.ts src/pages/ConnectionPropertiesPage.test.tsx src/pages/ConnectionsPage.test.tsx src/server/schedule-store.test.ts src/server/schedule-dispatch.test.ts src/server/next-fire.test.ts src/server/schedule-engine.test.ts
